		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = yes
			num_countries_with_special_status = {

				value > 0

	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_DOUBLE_UNION_NAME_GEN
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = no
			total_members >= 2
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_COUNTRIES_GEN
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = { save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character }
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				owner != scope:temp_first_character.owner
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_DYNASTIES_GEN
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty != scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_SAME_DYNASTY_GEN
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty = scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = { localization_key = default_UA_IO_GEN fallback = yes }
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

		localization_key = international_organization_DOUBLE_UNION_NAME_DAT

			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = no
			total_members >= 2
		}

		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_COUNTRIES_DAT
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = { save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character }
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				owner != scope:temp_first_character.owner
			}
		}
	}

		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_DYNASTIES_DAT
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty != scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_SAME_DYNASTY_DAT
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty = scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = { localization_key = default_UA_IO_DAT fallback = yes }
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union

		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_PERSONALIZED_UNION_NAME_ACC
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = yes
			num_countries_with_special_status = {
				type = special_status:senior_partner
				value > 0
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_DOUBLE_UNION_NAME_ACC
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = no
			total_members >= 2
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_COUNTRIES_ACC
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = { save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character }
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				owner != scope:temp_first_character.owner
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_DYNASTIES_ACC
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty != scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_SAME_DYNASTY_ACC
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty = scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = { localization_key = default_UA_IO_ACC fallback = yes }
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

					tag = HNE
					tag = JEC
					tag = SSH
					tag = WGG
				}
			}
		}

		localization_key = international_organization_hulun_jurchen_confederation_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:jurchen_confederation
			leader_country ?= { 
				OR = {
					tag = HDA
					tag = HOI
					tag = ULA

		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			union_flavor_is_habsburg = yes
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_PERSONALIZED_UNION_NAME_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = yes
			num_countries_with_special_status = {
				type = special_status:senior_partner
				value > 0
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_DOUBLE_UNION_NAME_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = no
			total_members >= 2
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_COUNTRIES_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = { save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character }
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				owner != scope:temp_first_character.owner
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_DYNASTIES_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty != scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_SAME_DYNASTY_INST
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty = scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = { localization_key = default_UA_IO_INST fallback = yes }
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

		localization_key = international_organization_PERSONALIZED_UNION_NAME_PREP
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = yes
			num_countries_with_special_status = {
				type = special_status:senior_partner
				value > 0
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_DOUBLE_UNION_NAME_PREP
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:union
			has_active_senior_partner = no
			total_members >= 2
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_COUNTRIES_PREP
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = { save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character }
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				owner != scope:temp_first_character.owner
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_DYNASTIES_PREP
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty != scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = international_organization_MARRIAGE_UNION_SAME_DYNASTY_PREP
		trigger = {
			international_organization_type ?= international_organization_type:marriage_union
			international_organization_leader_count = 2
			"leader_at_index(0)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				save_temporary_scope_as = temp_first_character
			}
			"leader_at_index(1)" = {
				has_dynasty = yes
				dynasty = scope:temp_first_character.dynasty
			}
		}
	}
	text = { localization_key = default_UA_IO_PREP fallback = yes }
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

IO_wntt_GEN = {
	log_loc_errors = no
	parent = IO_GEN
	suffix = "_wntt"
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
}

	suffix = "_wntt"
	if_invalid_loc = return_empty
